problem id: 9e61762f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  01110011 -> 11111010
  11000110 -> 10111101
  00010010 -> 00100000
  10100101 -> 01100011
  01111100 -> 11100111
  10000100 -> 00101001
  10010011 -> 00000010
  10001010 -> 00110110
  10111100 -> 01010111
  00111010 -> 01111010

query: 01110010
predicted answer: 11111000
